issueLinkDirection.note: Creates: story relates to test case (adjust if your link type is directional).

fields.title: summary
fields.note: If you add Steps/Expected custom fields, set their customfield IDs here and update SKILL.md.

duplicateCheckJql: project = {projectKey} AND issuetype = "Test Case" AND issue in linkedIssues({storyKey}) AND summary ~ "{summaryFragment}"
